title: [kimi-review] 16071f4: [SEVERITY: medium] **Issue record attribution was rewritten.
description:
Commit: 16071f4c3
Message: fix(senml): validate u64 in dec_int for negative CBOR

Finding: [SEVERITY: medium] **Issue record attribution was rewritten.** The assignee was changed from "Mark Atwood" to "AI Agent" and the original `closed_at`/`updated_at`/`close_reason` (set 2026-07-13) were overwritten. Unless this reflects a genuine re-close workflow, this erases prior history of who owned/closed the issue
close_reason: Restored original attribution in 65td.json; updated close_reason with details of senml validation fix while preserving Mark Atwood's 2026-07-13 closure record. Workflow note added to prefer --notes for history-preserving updates. Commit 80f7e8699.
